title: GLLQUEN BABY Baby Blankets for Newborn Soft 2 Pack, Muslin Cotton Baby Boy or Girl Blanket 95x100cm, Swaddle Blanket for Newborn, Shower Gifts for New Moms（Blue）
features: Soft silky and breathable: GLLQUEN BABY muslin swaddle blankets are made from 100% muslin cotton for maximum breathability with a skin-friendly soft touch. This fabric is 3 times softer than regular cotton and retains its original colour even after many washes. Keep your baby super cuddly and soft in this crawling blanket.

No more sleepless nights: size 38 inches x 40 inches (95 x 100 cm) 2 pack, large enough to easily swaddle babies, prevent newborns from waking up with random arm movements, restore the safe and cosy feeling of the womb, help calm your baby and let them sleep better. It also has a certain stretch that can ensure your baby's comfort.

Versatile and stylish: The GLLQUEN BABY baby blankets newborn can also be used as a reception blanket, cuddly blanket, nursing blanket, pram sun protection, burp cloth, car seat cover, play mat, changing mat, mini bed sheet and so on. Best baby gifts for new mothers, newborns and family.

Classic solid colour: GLLQUEN BABY cuddly blanket for children offers four classic and earthy colours without pattern, perfect for baby girls and baby boys. Modern and stylish blankets get softer with every wash. This solid color blanket will be one of your favorite pieces to wrap your baby in.
